title: [CI:DOCS] Add support for `podman login --verbose`
body:
Reference Issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/6717
Depends on PR:  https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1204 and https://github.com/containers/common/pull/607

**NOTE**: Following PR should be only merged when https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1204 & https://github.com/containers/common/pull/607 is merged in upstream and master is rebased.

Sample output
```bash
./podman login quay.io -v
Username: flouthoc
Password: 
Modified: /run/user/1000/containers/auth.json
Login Succeeded!
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **edsantiago** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @edsantiago` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Why not just make this the default. No need for verbose.  We already print out a string.  Just add you content.  I don't think people are using the out put of podman login command in a scripts, they  should just be checking the exit code.

@rhatdan I think adding it as default text would require `SetCredentials` to return modified path as @mtrmac suggested or I can create a new function in https://github.com/containers/image if we are cool with just printing this as by default and call that in Podman. I'll try to see if we have any good approach instead of passing `verbose` flag.

I'd prefer to add a test for it.
also need sign the commit messages, could use `git commit --amend -s` and `git push -f`
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@flouthoc @zhangguanzhang Any progress on this?

@rhatdan Sorry was not able to work on this for a while .Since this PR needs a major revamp and new API additions as per discussions here https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/6717 and https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1204. I'll put a proposal for those API changes then we can revisit this. But this PR will be revamped after that.
@rhatdan Updated this but following PR is dependent upon updated https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1204 and https://github.com/containers/common/pull/607.
need update the packages in your pr
@zhangguanzhang @TomSweeneyRedHat Sure i'll update packages, man page and tests once PR's in upstream dependencies are merged.
This PR would only update DOCS/man-page everything else related to `verbose` is added here -> https://github.com/containers/common/pull/607.
/hold this PR till  containers/common#607 is merged in upstream and master is re-based.
/hold cancel
@rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat This feature already got added in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10690 and even docs got updated. Just adding example if necessary otherwise we can drop this PR.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Applied requested changes. Could you please review again ?
LGTM
@rhatdan, PTAL and merge if it LGTY
/lgtm
/approve
